overview.description: The Franklin Massachusetts Municipal Income ETF (FTMA) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is actively managed and invests in municipal bonds exempt from federal income tax and Massachusetts personal income tax with maturities of at least three years. FTMA was launched on Nov 10, 2025 and is issued by Franklin Templeton.
